errors.EMAIL_EXISTS: This email is already in use.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.EXTERNAL_ACCOUNT: This email is linked to an external account.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.SERVICE_CONTEXT_UNREACHABLE: Can't reach TMDB or the target service.
errors.PROVIDER_LINKING_NOT_SUPPORTED: This provider doesn't support this linking method.
errors.PROVIDER_ALREADY_LINKED: This account is already linked to another user.
errors.PROVIDER_NOT_CONFIGURED: Server not configured for this provider.
errors.URL_BLOCKED_BY_SSRF_GUARD: This URL points to a private/internal address. Hardening is enabled — unset OSCARR_BLOCK_PRIVATE_SERVICES to allow LAN services.
errors.CSRF_HEADER_REQUIRED: Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.BACKUP_TOO_NEW: This backup was created by a newer version of Oscarr. Upgrade before restoring.
errors.BACKUP_SIGNATURE_INVALID: Backup signature is invalid — this archive may have been tampered with.
errors.BACKUP_UNSIGNED: This backup is not signed. Restoring is only allowed for backups created with the current signing key.
errors.ADMIN_HAS_NO_PASSWORD: This admin account has no password set — password re-auth is required to proceed.
common.name: Name
status.request_send_failed: Request created but could not be sent to the service. It will be retried automatically.
genre.title: Genres
login.title: Sign in to your account
login.login_link: Already have an account? Sign in
login.disclaimer: Sign in or create an account to access the application.
register.title: Create your account
install.title: Installation
install.subtitle: Set up your instance to get started
install.setup_secret_help: Enter the SETUP_SECRET from your .env file to begin installation.
install.admin_desc: Create your administrator account to manage the application.
install.resume_desc: An admin account already exists. Sign in to continue the installation from where you left off.
install.admin_required: This account is not an admin — the wizard needs an admin to continue.
install.arr_desc: Add at least one Radarr or Sonarr instance. You can add more later.
install.sync_desc: Importing your library from Radarr and Sonarr...
install.done_desc: Everything is set up. Sign in to get started.
search.placeholder: Search for a movie, a series...
requests.title: Requests
calendar.title: Upcoming releases
messages.title: Support
messages.description_placeholder: Describe your issue or request. Specify the movie/series, season and episode if applicable.
messages.no_tickets_help: Create a ticket to contact support
noAccess.title: Restricted access
noAccess.greeting: Hello {{username}}, your access is currently limited.
noAccess.no_server_description: Your Plex account does not have access to the server. Contact the administrator to be added.
noAccess.support_help: You can contact support for help.
admin.title: Administration
login.errors.EXTERNAL_ACCOUNT: This account was created via another provider — sign in with that provider instead.
login.errors.ACCOUNT_DISABLED: Your account has been disabled. Contact an administrator to restore access.
login.errors.DISCORD_GUILD_DENIED: Your Discord account isn't a member of the required server. Ask the administrator for an invite.
login.errors.SIGNUP_NOT_ALLOWED: No Oscarr account matches this login. Ask an administrator to create one for you.
login.errors.PROVIDER_DISABLED: This login method has been disabled by the administrator.
login.errors.DISCORD_ERROR: Discord login failed. Please try again or contact your administrator.
admin.authProviders.title: Authentication providers
admin.authProviders.subtitle: Enable the login methods your users can choose from and configure OAuth credentials where needed.
admin.authProviders.service_required: Configure the {{service}} service first to enable this login method.
admin.authProviders.callback_url_help: Paste into the provider's OAuth Redirects.
admin.authProviders.fields.allowSignup.h: Auto-create Oscarr users on first login.
admin.authProviders.fields.guildId.label: Guild (Server) ID
admin.authProviders.fields.guildId.help: Members-only gate. Developer Mode → right-click server → Copy ID.
admin.keywords.description: Keywords are synced from TMDB for each media in your library. Tag keywords to enable filtering (e.g. NSFW content hiding).
admin.keywords.name: Keyword
admin.keywords.empty: No keywords synced yet. Keywords will appear after the next sync job runs.
admin.quality.profiles_fetch_failed: Failed to load profiles — service may be unreachable.
admin.quality.seed_failed: Failed to seed default quality options.
admin.services.detect_machine_id_failed: Failed to detect Plex machine ID.
admin.services.reveal_password_prompt: Enter your admin password to reveal this secret:
admin.services.secret_stored: Stored — click the eye to reveal
admin.services.ssrf_blocked: URL points to a private address. Hardening (OSCARR_BLOCK_PRIVATE_SERVICES) is on — unset it to allow LAN services.
admin.jobs.webhooks_load_failed: Failed to load services for webhooks.
admin.blacklist.search_failed: Search failed — TMDB may be unreachable.
nsfw.modal.title: Sensitive content
nsfw.modal.description: This content has been flagged as mature.
admin.dashboard.probe_failed: This metric could not be fetched.
admin.setup_checklist.title: Finish setting up Oscarr
admin.setup_checklist.all_required_done: All required steps done — {{done}} of {{total}} optional
admin.setup_checklist.items.media-server: Plex, Jellyfin or Emby — required to detect what's already in your library.
admin.setup_checklist.items.radarr.title: Add a Radarr instance
admin.setup_checklist.items.radarr.desc: Without it, movie requests can't be fulfilled.
admin.setup_checklist.items.sonarr.title: Add a Sonarr instance
admin.setup_checklist.items.sonarr.desc: Without it, TV show requests can't be fulfilled.
admin.setup_checklist.items.quality-opti: Users pick from these when they request media.
admin.setup_checklist.items.default-fold: Tells the routing engine where to land movies, TV, and anime by default.
admin.setup_checklist.items.routing-rule: Route anime or specific genres to dedicated folders (recommended for mixed libraries).
admin.setup_checklist.items.notification: Discord, Telegram or Email so admins get pinged on new requests and incidents.
admin.features.disabled_login_desc: Choose how the login screen responds when a user marked as disabled tries to sign in.
admin.features.disabled_login_friendly_d: Login rejected with an explicit message telling the user their account is disabled.
admin.features.disabled_login_silent_des: Login rejected with a generic "Invalid credentials" error. The user has no indication their account was disabled.
admin.homepage.help: Drag sections to reorder. Toggle visibility or add custom sections.
admin.homepage.empty: No sections configured. Add a custom section or reset to defaults.
admin.homepage.confirm_delete_desc: This custom section will be removed from the homepage layout.
admin.homepage.confirm_reset_desc: This will replace your current layout with the default homepage sections.
admin.homepage.preview_empty: Adjust the filters above to see a preview.
admin.users.sort.name: Name
admin.users.sync_failed: Failed to sync {{provider}} — check the provider configuration.
admin.users.sync_pending_count_one: {{count}} user on the provider without an Oscarr account
admin.users.sync_pending_count_other: {{count}} users on the provider without an Oscarr account
admin.users.sync_pending_hint: Found on the provider but not in Oscarr. Review and import the ones you want.
admin.users.import_modal.title: Import from {{provider}}
admin.users.import_modal.subtitle_one: {{count}} user found on the provider without an Oscarr account — pick which ones to import.
admin.users.import_modal.subtitle_other: {{count}} users found on the provider without an Oscarr account — pick which ones to import.
admin.users.confirm_delete_desc: This will permanently delete the user and all their data (requests, notifications, tickets).
admin.services.no_services_help: Add your first service to get started
admin.services.webhook_enabled_toast: Webhook enabled for {{name}} — instant sync active
admin.services.webhook_failed_toast: Failed to toggle webhook. Check Site URL and API Key in General settings.
admin.services.plex_token_error: No Plex token found. Sign in with Plex from the login page to link your account.
admin.paths.defaults_desc: Fallback paths used when no routing rule matches. These apply by default to all requests.
admin.paths.rules_help: Rules are evaluated by priority. The first matching rule determines the folder. If none match, the default folder is used.
admin.paths.confirm_delete_desc: This action cannot be undone. The routing rule will be permanently deleted.
admin.paths.services_unreachable: Unable to reach: {{services}}. Check your configuration in the Services tab.
admin.notifications.matrix_desc: Choose which channels receive each notification type.
admin.quality.profiles_error: Could not load profiles. Check the service connection.
admin.quality.no_services: No Radarr/Sonarr service enabled. Add services in the "Services" tab to configure mappings.
admin.jobs.webhooks_desc: Webhooks provide instant sync — when media is imported, added or deleted in your services, Oscarr is notified in real-time instead of waiting for the next scheduled sync.
admin.instance.instance_languages_desc: Primary language for this instance. Affects TMDB metadata and content rating.
admin.instance.site_name_desc: Displayed in the browser tab and on the login page
changelog.title: What's New
changelog.subtitle: Here's what changed. Your butler got smarter.
admin.instance.maintenance_desc: Displayed at the top of all pages. Leave empty to hide.
admin.features.section_desc: Enable or disable site sections for users
admin.blacklist.title: Blacklist
admin.blacklist.search_placeholder: Search for a movie or series to block...
requests.confirm_delete_desc: This only removes the request from Oscarr — the media stays on your services.
requests.cleanup_desc: Select which request statuses to permanently delete.
admin.instance.site_url_desc: Public URL used in notification links (e.g. https://oscarr.example.com)
admin.save_bar.save_failed: Save failed — your changes weren't stored.
admin.load.failed: Failed to load settings. Retry, or refresh the page.
admin.instance.api_key_desc: Used for external integrations (health check, monitoring, plugins). Pass as X-Api-Key header or Authorization: Bearer token.
admin.instance.api_key_reveal_failed: Could not fetch the API key — try again.
admin.instance.api_key_copy_failed: Copy failed — try selecting the key manually.
admin.instance.api_key_generate_failed: API key generation failed — try again.
admin.instance.api_key_regenerate_failed: API key regeneration failed — try again.
admin.instance.api_key_revoke_failed: API key revocation failed — try again.
admin.features.search_cooldown_desc: Minimum time between two missing episode searches for the same media
admin.features.auto_approve_desc: Requests are automatically approved without admin validation
admin.features.nsfw_blur_desc: Blur content rated as explicitly adult (NC-17, X). Does not affect age-restricted content (R, 18+).
admin.danger.title: Danger zone
admin.danger.description: These actions are irreversible. Use with caution.
admin.danger.purge_failed: Purge failed — the operation did not complete.
admin.danger.purge_requests_desc: Deletes all requests from all users. Media is preserved.
admin.danger.purge_media_desc: Deletes all imported media and associated requests. Run a Full Sync afterwards to re-import.
admin.danger.purge_users_desc: Deletes all users except your admin account. Re-import from Plex afterwards.
plugin.no_settings: This plugin has no configurable settings.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.msg.request_auto_approved: Your request for "{{title}}" has been auto-approved.
notifications.msg.request_approved: Your request for "{{title}}" has been approved.
notifications.msg.request_declined: Your request for "{{title}}" has been declined.
admin.backup.title: Backup & Restore
admin.backup.create_desc: Download a full backup of your database
admin.backup.restore_desc: Upload a backup to restore your data
admin.backup.drop_file: Click to select a backup file
admin.backup.too_new: This backup is from a newer version and cannot be restored
admin.backup.no_db: Backup archive does not contain a database file
admin.backup.needs_migration: This backup is from an older version — migrations will be applied automatically
admin.backup.restore_warning: This will replace your entire database. A safety backup will be created before restore.
admin.backup.confirm_password_help: Re-entering your password prevents an attacker with a stolen session from restoring a rogue backup.
admin.backup.signature_invalid: This backup's signature doesn't match this Oscarr instance — it was created on another install or tampered with.
admin.backup.unsigned: This backup was created before integrity signing was enabled. Set BACKUP_ALLOW_UNSIGNED=true to restore it.
admin.backup.admin_no_password: Your account has no password set — add a local password before restoring.
admin.backup.restart_required: Please restart Oscarr to apply changes.
admin.backup.include_cache: Include TMDB cache in backup (larger file)
admin.roles.title: Roles
admin.roles.name: Name
admin.roles.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{{name}}"?
admin.roles.in_use_desc_one: {{count}} user still has the role "{{name}}". Pick a role to migrate them to before deleting.
admin.roles.in_use_desc_other: {{count}} users still have the role "{{name}}". Pick a role to migrate them to before deleting.
